overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ (SQQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund provides (-3x) inverse exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 100 of the largest non-financial firms listed on the NASDAQ. SQQQ was launched on Feb 9, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: As the Nasdaq 100 index sinks, is it time to buy SQQQ ETF?
data.text: The Nasdaq 100 index suffered a harsh reversal on Wednesday as the market reacted to the mixed earnings by Tesla and Alphabet. It slipped by more than 505 points, its worst single-day drop since 2022.
